title: hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. glabratum
intro: Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. glabratum is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family known for its bright yellow flowers and edible leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The leaves of Hieracium scorzonerifolium subsp. glabratum have been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory infections, offering benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare practitioner.
